# Node n6 Evidence

## task
In all 4 plan-validator copies, rename `'docs-lookup'` to `'knowledge-lookup'` in the `CANONICAL_ROLES` array (line 52 of each file). Mechanical token rename — array structure and all other content unchanged.

## non_tdd_reason
**Category: Migration / rename pass.**
This is a mechanical CANONICAL_ROLES token rename applied identically to all 4 semantically-coupled validator copies. There is no natural failing unit test for a pure identifier rename; correctness is verified by confirming the old token is absent, the new token is present, and the module loads without syntax error.

## write_set
- `scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js`
- `plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js`
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/kaola-gitlab-workflow-plan-validator.js`
- `plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/kaola-gitea-workflow-plan-validator.js`

## verification_commands

### Rename confirmation (grep)
```
grep -n "docs-lookup\|knowledge-lookup" \
  scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js \
  plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js \
  plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/kaola-gitlab-workflow-plan-validator.js \
  plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/kaola-gitea-workflow-plan-validator.js
```
Exit code: 0

### Syntax check
```
node -e "require('./scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js')" && echo "syntax-ok"
```
Exit code: 0

## before_result
All 4 files contained `'docs-lookup'` at line 52 of CANONICAL_ROLES. No `'knowledge-lookup'` present.

## after_result
```
scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js:52:  'code-explorer', 'knowledge-lookup', 'planner', 'code-architect', 'tdd-guide',
plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js:52:  'code-explorer', 'knowledge-lookup', 'planner', 'code-architect', 'tdd-guide',
plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/kaola-gitea-workflow-plan-validator.js:52:  'code-explorer', 'knowledge-lookup', 'planner', 'code-architect', 'tdd-guide',
plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/kaola-gitlab-workflow-plan-validator.js:52:  'code-explorer', 'knowledge-lookup', 'planner', 'code-architect', 'tdd-guide',
```
`'docs-lookup'` absent from all 4 files. `'knowledge-lookup'` present in all 4 at line 52. Module loads cleanly (syntax-ok, exit 0). build-green.
